programs.title: Summer House
programs.desc: (2008) Mystery-thriller starring Lindsay Price. A woman inherits a family summer house haunted by a centuries-old curse, leading to a series of strange events that threaten her life.

programs.title: The Killer Downstairs
programs.desc: (2019) Disturbing thriller starring Cindy Busby. Alison thinks she's won the tenancy lottery when the seemingly perfect James moves into her basement. But some house rules are about to be broken...

programs.title: Predestination
programs.desc: (2015) Sci-fi action with Ethan Hawke and Succession's Sarah Snook. A temporal agent who stops crimes before they happen is tasked with catching a fugitive who's always one step ahead in time.

programs.title: Sniper Elite
programs.desc: A squad of elite human soldiers faces down a powerful and deadly extraterrestrial army. Starring Kevin Sorbo (2014)

programs.title: House of Darkness
programs.desc: (2002) Supernatural horror with Kate Bosworth and Justin Long. A man accompanies a mysterious woman to her secluded estate, but shadowy figures make it clear he isn't welcome.

programs.title: Outlaws and Angels
programs.desc: (2016) Tense western starring Chad Michael Murray and Luke Wilson. A pastor's family home provides the perfect hideout for three violent fugitives. A long night of cat and mouse games beckons...
